Transform is an emerging brand that delivers marketing services with a focus on live events and production. Services include Strategy (branding, copy, content writing, email marketing, split testing), Digital (digital campaigns, web design and development, customer services platforms, social media marketing), and Production (live video production, animation, exhibition stands, D.T.P. services, 3D assets). The team consists of Eric Russel (head, strategy, customer relationship, internal management), Irene Callander (communications, copywriting, strategy), John Abrams (technical expert, hardware), Liam Dawson (development, video editing, 3D, graphics), and Benjamin Powell (programmer, database, security, optimization).
